text.title: The Emirates First Class Experience 2024 - Let’s be Honest!

South Africa today in first
[Music]
class thank you welcome all right see
you have a all right bye bye
[Music]
so they're renovating the lounge at the
moment I'm sitting in a temporary area I
was told tomorrow is going to be the
grand opening of the new first class
lounge and I missed out one day too
early there's a lots of food as you
would expect In First Class Lounge I'm
eating a masala omelets ever since
someone introduced that to me I keep
coming back here for more it's not on
the menu but next time when you come to
the first class lounch at emerals make
sure ask for Masala omelets at the
breakfast okay now heading to the gate
it's always luck of the jaw you never
know sometimes a short walk sometimes A
Long Walk could be really long could do
10,000 steps in Dubai easily so today's
gate spe 32 at the end of uh Bravo

lacquer thank you thank you enjoy your
trip man here hi by this is a rear weird

was a ship change that was 27 paror and
then the 38 is actually parked in a

corner it's always exciting on a TR
Bridge boarding an

are you doing hey good can I check your
yeah this is not so amazing dragging a
20 kilo suitcase good morning how are
you f how are you good

good this is not quite the usual
boarding experience I think hello how
are you good to see
you my name is Ashley I'll be looking
after you today along with my colleagues
Nuri and Pang welcome back on board
we've missed you is there anything else
I can do for you today to help you
settle in per have something to drink
let's have a glass of champagne please
absolutely so Mr we have the 2013
vintage D paing for you
today
for cheers so this is more like it this
is back to the usual envir environment
um is a little bit uh different boarding
because there is no second Jet Bridge
reaching the top deck so you have to
walk from the bottom deck which is a
little little bit hustle as a lots of
people wonder why and how do I often get
to fly first class right I'm going to
explain to you let's go very personal
today on this
[Music]
flight is your channel in front of you
anticipating good weather conditions
fire route off you any ring material for

from actually I'm actually from melbour
Australia mbour hi by I'm from C nice to
meet you welcome on board likewise
another R te s near and myself are
beginning the traditional Arabic coffee
and date service may I offer you any
Arabic
dates we have Len shamond plain or
orange F I pass this okay no problem
look

[Music]

at wow it's really crazy here you will
never see this in any other airport
because all the traffic here is heavy
80s dancing around
[Music]
going PR watch
[Music]
so welcome back we just took off and
reached the cruising attitude 34,000 ft
currently flying south over Oman and
we're going to continue southbound uh
towards Somalia Horn of Africa and then
we're going to fly over the coast of
Kenya Tanzania over Dar Salam and and
then we're going to come Inland into
southern Africa over uh uh I think it's
malavi and then mosambik and then uh
Zimbabwe before landing into
Johannesburg it's going to be a 7 and
1/2 hour flight
today I really like this feature the
auto door you can play open and closed
so many times now the reason I'm going
to South Africa is actually to catch a
private jets uh it will be jetting
around around the whole Africa I'm going
to a couple new countries first it will
be Muto mosambi and then it will be
Nairobi Kenya and then there will be
Lagos Nigeria so uh I'll be on board a
private jet and then doing a rooll show
among with uas TR support so it will be
a lot of fun this could be one of the
best flights of my life and I want to
compare it with emer's first class see
if Emmer's first class beats the private
jet experience or the
now let's go personal and lots of people
wondering Sam is Airline pay you to fly
first class how can you afford to fly
first class all the time well the reason
is not quite that is actually I'm on
business trips a lot of business invite
a lot of business shows conventions air
shows the invited party book me in
business class and I use my miles to
upgrade a first class that's a cheaper
way to obtain first class using your
miles to upgrade is that pay upfront a
lots of cash so emeritz has provided me
with good opportunities to create
content on board but there is a company
policy that they simply do not pay
influencer that includes me so looking
at the product here the one I'm sitting
right today fly to Johannes it's not one
of the latest first class products on
emerals because the newer A380 actually
has a white leather seats and with
different color wood trims and all the
Decker and Furnishings um these A380 do
also feature premium economy so they
find mainly to outra Long Haul
destination in the US Australia New
Zealand and also they fly to London he
and a few other key destination so
Johannesburg is not one of those
yet so how long you've done this as a
cabin crew as a c crew coming up to 9
years
now I still love it just as much as the
first
[Music]
dat please enjoy your
[Music]
we have here our surprise am bu with
compliments from the ship so it's p true
Mose with Comfort duck cck and orange
segments we also have the wit to Ricotta
and goat cheese with pickled tomatoes
and balsamic grapes would you like to
try them yes sure

this is so good this is one of the

now one and a half so 50 Grand yes I see
you look at this lot here shiny

of cavea you ever serve to a passenger
how many times so one of my colleagues
actually served seven servings of cavar
which is quite huge because our single
portion is actually 50 g so he had seven
helping which is amazing seven times 50
g that's 350 G I would say 50 g will
cost at least about $3 $400 so he
definitely had ticket worth the money
[Music]
back well we're in the back of the
lounge here and um Captain just came on
said to everybody's crew to be seated so
they have to remove most of the bottles
from the bar and get see it quickly so
now I'm taking turbulence really
seriously after seeing the last couple
months there's a high-profile turbulence
um accident on airplanes right yeah now
we're going to get seated there's seat
bels actually here in the uh Bar Lounge
what's her name Ramy here with Ramy one
of the loyal ambers passengers very much
so I'm a big fan oh thank you thank you
but I really enjoy Aviation like you do
uh and I enjoy your your videos about
707s and and all all these specially
limited editions that you do and the
countries that you Vis it's really it
must be really interesting Nostalgia but
unfortunately I think AV is heading
towards the more boring way it's going
to be more green but it's going to be
787 and 350 for a very long time I'm
hoping Super Sonic will come back who
knows I I this is my dream to get on the
N oh my cut okay so it's really we're
going to cut off from here we'll talk
later see you you're so good at
turbulence you're not even scared about
because we experience it all the time a
so I mean
like fine we're got tossed in a speing
machine we're doing pretty well though
huh but this is rare because it's clear
air turbulence C I've never seen this in
my life yeah it's not we're in an area
of cloud or coverage it's all clear
outside and then you know the tail of
the fre feels like fishing around fish
tailing and we're we're obviously at the
back of the plane so we feel I think a
little bit more than probably people at
the front you do feel more yeah before
take off she came to my seat and gave me
a car very surprised such a beautiful
drawing as well and that was Shante the
really one of the friendliest em crew
I've ever met oh that's very kind thank
you so much and tell us where you from
so hi guys my name is Chante I'm from
South Africa actually so I'm going home
I'm going to go see my parents I'm
actually really really excited because
for me obviously this is home so I'm
going to bring all the needs and
everything that I can back for all of
the crew tomorrow yeah yes
[Music]
[Applause]
[Music]
so the flight went really fast uh we're
1 and a half hour to land now over at
Harari Zimbabwe southbound to
Johannesburg and I was enjoying uh
watching the Olympics the live TV it's
amazing my God this Curry dish I'm
eating is called mambasa spiced chicken
curry it's incredible thumbs up it just
it's a mild Curry but the flavor was so
balanced it's so smooth as well and I
had a glass of red Bodo St Julian 2006
and here's a funny story because I talk
about caviar so much the fight attendant
prepared a second Ser of caviar and they
just give it out to me when I uh ready
to die I didn't ask for it and I was s
this is a joke but they already played
it up I thought okay I'll just apply but
I don't want to eat that much because I
might die it's so rich but it's so good
so we're close to land now one of
feature I missed out on today's flight
was the showering spot they did offer me
after I woke up but I just didn't feel
like want to have a shower and mess my
hair and but the shower spy is
definitely one a unique feature on em
380 first class I think I've flown all
together 30 to 40 times first class from
last 15 years or so we enous I think the
consistency has definitely getting
higher and higher in the on board cabin
products has always been up improving
look at a cavar look at a wine selection
the food and everything's just getting
better but I hope that they can improve
the ground service to make it even more
exclusive at the airport and the lounges
so now I'm looking forward to try out
the private jet experience to see if
that beats the emer's first class hello
everyone this is a conference call this
is George okay is economy online this a
business class online okay we need to
check we 10,000 ft we're about to landar
thank you everyone
[Music]
it's been a long time so happy to be
back here
today's going to be a jackpot Ride Clear
take offra mik fo incredibly powerful
Landing in
Mandi let's explore this is my kitchen
like your little good loock charm what
kind of engine does airplane have Max
ceiling is 51,000 that's a b commercial
jet always get the shortcuts we're not

pretty much you have the freedom to do

descent we're faster than you we
